chapters.title: Shubha Vedha (Benefic Piercing)
chapters.content_preview: Shubha Vedha (Benefic Piercing)  Triggered when a natural benefic planet—Jupiter, Venus, unafflicted Mercury, or a bright Waxing/Full Moon— transits a stellar coordinate. chapters.title: Papa Vedha (Malefic Piercing)
chapters.content_preview: Papa Vedha (Malefic Piercing)  Triggered when a natural malefic planet—Saturn, Mars, Rahu, Ketu, the Sun, or a dark Waning/New Moon—crosses a coordinate.
